zh.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort於大約1127年出生。她於大約1150年與Robert Noell結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於從1162年1月8日到1163年1月7日在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort于大约1127年出生。她于大约1150年与Robert Noell结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于从1162年1月8日到1163年1月7日在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort was born about 1127. She married Robert Noell about 1150. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died from 8 January 1162 to 7 January 1163, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort est née environ 1127. Elle a épousé Robert Noell environ 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée du 8 janvier 1162 au 7 janvier 1163, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort wurde um 1127 geboren. Sie hat um 1150 Robert Noell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb von 8. Januar 1162 bis 7. Januar 1163 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort è nata il circa 1127. Lei sposato Robert Noell circa 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì da 8 gennaio 1162 a 7 gennaio 1163, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfortは約1127年に生まれた。約1150年にRobert Noellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1162年1月8日まで1163年1月7日にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort(은)는 대략 1127년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1150년 Robert Noell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 1월 8일부터 1163년 1월 7일까지 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1127. Ela casou-se com Robert Noell aproximadamente 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu de 8 de janeiro de 1162 a 7 de janeiro de 1163, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Montfort родилась около 1127 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Noell около 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла с 8 января 1162 по 7 января 1163 в местности Англия, Великобритания.
